headline: American Tower (AMT) Is Up 7.7% After Dividend Hike And Debt Raise Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: American Tower Corporation recently declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$1.79 per share, payable on July 13, 2026 to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026, and completed a €750.00 million offering of 4.000% senior unsecured notes due September 1, 2033. Together with an analyst upgrade following stronger-than-expected first-quarter results and raised full-year outlook, these actions highlight American Tower’s focus on shareholder returns and capital structure management.
